story-context.title: Issuer, Audience, and Role Validation (Layers 6-8)
story-context.summary: Implement JWT Layers 6-8: Issuer validation (Keycloak realm), Audience validation (eaf-api), and Role normalization with ROLE_ prefix for Spring Security compatibility. This story is CRITICAL as it enables role-based access control for all subsequent authorization features.

acceptance-criteria.criterion: RoleNormalizer.kt extracts and normalizes roles into Set<GrantedAuthority> with ROLE_ prefix
Tokens from wrong issuer rejected with 401
Property-based tests for role normalization edge cases (nested structures, missing keys)

critical-importance.alert: CRITICAL FIX APPLIED: RoleNormalizer must return Set<GrantedAuthority>, not Set<String>
CRITICAL FIX APPLIED: Must add ROLE_ prefix for Spring Security hasRole() compatibility
Without this fix, ALL @PreAuthorize checks will FAIL and RBAC will be non-functional

sections.section: Lines 284-330: RoleNormalizer.kt CORRECTED implementation with GrantedAuthority
Lines 1195-1235: Property-Based Test examples for role normalization

architecture-alignment.pattern: 3 role styles supported: Traditional (WIDGET_ADMIN), Permission (widget:create), Prefixed (ROLE_ADMIN)

example.name: RoleNormalizer.kt
example.description: CRITICAL: Extracts roles from Keycloak JWT and normalizes to Spring Security GrantedAuthority with ROLE_ prefix

example.name: RoleNormalizationPropertyTest.kt
example.description: Property-based testing for edge cases in role normalization

implementation-sequence.step: Create RoleNormalizer.kt with companion object for ROLE_PREFIX
Extract roles from realm_access.roles (Keycloak realm-level roles)
Apply ROLE_ prefix normalization using when() expression
Write unit tests with Nullable Pattern (mock JWT claims)
Write property-based tests for edge cases (empty roles, null values, nested structures)
Integration test validates @PreAuthorize works with normalized roles (Story 3.9 dependency)

unit-tests.pattern: Kotest FunSpec with mock JWT (mockJwt helper)
unit-tests.coverage: Test all 3 role styles (traditional, permission, prefixed)
Test both present (union of both sets)

property-tests.focus: Edge cases: empty lists, null values, special characters

common-pitfalls.pitfall: Returning Set<String> instead of Set<GrantedAuthority> breaks Spring Security
Missing ROLE_ prefix causes hasRole() checks to fail
Not handling missing realm_access or resource_access gracefully (NPE)

definition-of-done.item: All 8 acceptance criteria met with test evidence
ROLE_ prefix applied correctly (validated by unit tests)
Property-based tests pass (100 iterations, edge cases)
Fuzz test runs 5 minutes without crashes
Integration test validates @PreAuthorize compatibility (prep for Story 3.9)
